positive: Minimalist geometric depiction of a forest landscape at dawn. The composition features overlapping semi-abstract shapes representing trees, mountains, and stylized foliage. Use a palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, muted sage green, and cream white. Focus on clean silhouettes and high contrast, giving it a sophisticated, modern, vintage screen-print aesthetic. The pattern should be symmetrical and scalable for apparel printing, with crisp lines and flat color application. Central composition, vector-art quality, perfect for all over print.
